action.reasoning: Observation: DKT_SkillEmb with strong regularization underperformed the baseline DKT. Analysis: The baseline DKT with LSTM worked well. GRU is often comparable or better than LSTM on sequence tasks and trains faster. I will implement DKT_GRU and DKT_Concat (separate embeddings for skill and correctness) to explore architectural variations. Decision: Train DKT_GRU for 20 epochs with the same hyperparameters as the best DKT model (embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, dropout=0.2) and evaluate.
